texto: Every rule, every chart, every geeky statistic in a game book or module feeds into this impulse. All those details allow us to take apart existence, look at the individual parts, figure out how they work, and put them back together. Some people relieve stress by getting drunk or high and losing control; nerds find comfort by taking control and applying structure. Logic is like a warm blanket.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a David M. Ewalt: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Every rule, every chart, every geeky statistic in a game book or module feeds into this impulse. …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, control, gaming pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e gaming.
